heroHeadline: Russia's Full-Scale War Against Ukraine — Day 1,486
heroSubtitle: Active conflict along 1,000+ km frontline. Peace talks stalled over territory, security guarantees. EU Coalition of the Willing pledges troops. US eases some Russia oil sanctions amid Iran crisis.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, NYT, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
